servicesIntro.title: Services
servicesIntro.description: Add a short description of your editing, motion, color, and content services here.

services.label: SHORTS
services.title: Short-Form Edits
services.description: Fast-paced reels, shorts, and social clips shaped for retention and clean delivery.

services.label: EDITING
services.title: Video Editing
services.description: Polished long-form edits with pacing, structure, sound, and story handled end to end.

services.label: MOTION
services.title: Motion Graphics
services.description: Animated titles, callouts, transitions, and visual accents that support the edit.

services.label: COLOR
services.title: Color Grading
services.description: Consistent color, contrast, and finishing so every shot feels intentional.

services.label: CONTENT
services.title: Content Packages
services.description: Platform-ready batches with hooks, captions, aspect ratios, and export versions.

services.label: PRODUCTION
services.title: Production Support
services.description: Creative direction, shot planning, and edit notes to make footage easier to shape.
